title: Waingapu heat wave
lead: Waingapu is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.31. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Waingapu are characterized by high temperatures and moderate humidity at 51%. 
 The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 10.6 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The wind speed is relatively moderate at 11.5 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
